name: Just Park It 11
author: Poki
description: Just Park It 11 is the eleventh installment of the classic car parking series. Drive an enormous truck through narrow streets filled with obstacles and congested traffic. Pass through the traffic without crashing the truck and park at the right spot and complete all the meticulously designed chaotic tracks. Can you prove that you're a real truck driver? How to play: Park your vehicle without losing all your health. Brake - Space key Drive - Arrow keys About the creator: Just Park It 11 is created by Brain Software. Check out their other game Extreme Off Road Cars 3: Cargo on Poki!
